vpn._comment: Fill enrollEndpoint with your new server once provisioned (e.g. https://vpn.hamidun.com). Leave empty to disable VPN auto-config (the VPN scripts will skip gracefully).

nomad._comment: Fill repoUrl with the Nomad agent repo once pushed (e.g. https://github.com/JHamidun/nomad). Empty => the Nomad component installs from vendor/nomad-src if bundled, else skips gracefully. packageName matches pyproject [project].name.
